/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/XAC.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/XAC.dir/src/Node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/XAC.dir/src/bison/yacc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/XAC.dir/src/flex/lexical.cpp.o -o /home/k40/X4A/bin/XAC   -L/home/k40/LLVM/build/./lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/k40/LLVM/build/./lib /home/k40/LLVM/build/lib/libLLVMCore.a /home/k40/LLVM/build/lib/libLLVMBinaryFormat.a /home/k40/LLVM/build/lib/libLLVMRemarks.a /home/k40/LLVM/build/lib/libLLVMBitstreamReader.a /home/k40/LLVM/build/lib/libLLVMTargetParser.a /home/k40/LLVM/build/lib/libLLVMSupport.a /home/k40/LLVM/build/lib/libLLVMDemangle.a -lrt -ldl -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
